privileged_info_summary: The configure_external_builder task creates a synthetic Eclipse Java project named 'AutoVer' at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/AutoVer. The project contains a shell script at scripts/gen_version.sh that generates a version timestamp file at src/main/resources/version.txt when executed. The task requires the user to configure an Eclipse external builder named 'VersionGenerator' that runs this script as part of the auto-build and clean build processes, with the launch configuration saved as VersionGenerator.launch in the project root. All metadata values are verified as correct and consistent across setup, verification, and export scripts.
